title: Bridge Essay: Neural correlates of mystical experience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Neural correlates of mystical experience.**. Neuropsychologia.. PMID: 26631541. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuropsychologia.2015.11.021. Mystical experiences, or subjectively believed encounters with asupernatural world, are widely reported across cultures and throughout human history. Previous theories speculate that executive brain functions underpin mystical experiences. To evaluate causal hypotheses, structural studies of brain lesion are required.
